title: leymus mollis subsp. villosissimus
intro: Leymus mollis subsp. villosissimus, also known as a type of grass, is a subspecies of Leymus mollis that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The medicinal properties of Leymus mollis subsp. villosissimus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems. Leymus mollis subsp. villosissimus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to make cough syrups and other medicinal products.
